query:
SELECT 
  t.name as trilha,
  p.name as programa,
  p.totalSessoes as sessoes_previstas_programa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ms.alunoId) as alunos
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
JOIN trilhas t ON ms.trilhaId = t.id
JOIN programs p ON t.programId = p.id
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, p.name, p.totalSessoes
ORDER BY t.name
